name: odoo-tech-writer-team-skills
description: Claude Code skills maintained by the Odoo technical writing team

plugins.name: get-pr-links-plugin
plugins.description: Extracts and reorganizes GitHub Pull Request links from runbot freeze HTML, previews them as HTML, then writes Scope and GitHub PR URL to a Google Sheet

plugins.name: doc-impact-plugin
plugins.description: Analyzes a GitHub PR for documentation impact and generates a task title + description for technical writers

plugins.name: pr-to-task-plugin
plugins.description: Converts GitHub PR links or numbers to Odoo task URLs
